byNBC 10 NEWS

(WJAR)  —A wake was held for longtime Cumberland firefighter Gregory Jones on Monday.

Jones, 63, died last Monday of occupational cancer, according to Cumberland officials.

Authorities said Jones worked with the Cumberland Hill Fire District and the Cumberland Fire Department for 21 years.

A wake was held for longtime Cumberland firefighter Gregory Jones on Monday, May 13, 2024. (WJAR)

Cumberland officials said Jones retired in 2022 due to an illness.

According to officials, Jones was also a great supporter of Rhode Island Special Olympics and volunteered at national events.

The wake was held at Duffy Funeral Home on Monday.

His funeral will be held on Tuesday at Historic St. Joseph Church in Cumberland.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: Wake held for longtime Cumberland firefighter who died of occupational cancer
description: A wake was held for longtime Cumberland firefighter Gregory Jones on Monday.
